top_signals.title: Oil Hits Lowest Since Early March on Potential Hormuz Reopening
top_signals.summary: Oil fell to the lowest since the early days of the Iran war on signs that flows through the Strait of Hormuz are rising and on progress toward an interim peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ukraine’s defense AI chief predicts ‘new paradigm’ of warfare
top_signals.summary: “The system that possesses more data and better understands that data, proposes solutions — that system will gain the advantage over the other."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB announces main milestones for roll-out of Integrated Reporting Framework
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/05 - Implementation of Bank of England Statistics Taxonomy v1.3.1
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: FreightWeekSTL Panel Highlights Building US Inland Waterways Workforce
top_signals.summary: A recent FreightWeekSTL panel highlighted how expanding awareness of maritime careers, strengthening industry partnerships and increasing access to hands-on experiences are critical to building the next-generation workforce for America’s inland waterways.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: HaiSea Marine is expanding its fleet on BC's North Coast and has placed orders for one new escort tugboat and two terminal tugboats.The contract to build an escort tug was awarded to Sanmar Shipyards, based in Türkiye. The escort vessel is a…
